# executed

**Instance Property**

The list of rules whose actions have been performed during evaluation of the system.

## Declaration

```swift
var executed: [GKRule] { get }
```

## Discussion

When you call the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/evaluate()] method, the system considers each rule in the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/agenda] list in order. If a rule on the agenda is satisfied—that is, its predicate returns [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] and it executes its action—the system moves that rule to the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKRuleSystem/executed] list.

## Related Documentation

- **rules**: The list of rules to be executed when evaluating the system.

## Evaluating a Rule System

- **evaluate()**: Evaluates the rule system, executing the list of rules in its agenda.
- **agenda**: The list of rules to be considered when evaluating the system.
- **reset()**: Returns the rule system to its original agenda and clears all facts.
